checks.description: When wave reaches its maximum value 31, it must subsequently decrement on a later observed clock edge.
checks.pass_condition: After observing wave == 31, a later observation must show wave < 31, indicating a decrement direction.
checks.trigger_condition: When wave equals 31 for the first time after reset.

checks.description: Observe that wave changes by at most +/-1 between consecutive observed cycles after reset.
checks.pass_condition: Each successive observed value of wave differs by no more than one step, ensuring monotonic stepwise progression without jumps.
checks.trigger_condition: After reset release, during the observation window defined in the plan.
